message:
feat(fnp-python): numpy.polynomial class re-exports (d7a1)

Create fnp_python.polynomial submodule and expose the 6 numpy.polynomial
class objects (Polynomial, Chebyshev, Legendre, Hermite, HermiteE,
Laguerre) as direct re-exports of numpy's real classes. `isinstance`
checks against fnp_python.polynomial.Polynomial work against any numpy
Polynomial instance (identity equivalence, not just structural equality).

Resolution pattern matches numpy.random.BitGenerator re-export:
- eager setattr when numpy.polynomial is importable at module init
- PEP-562 __getattr__ fallback installed unconditionally in the
  submodule's __dict__ so numpy-less CI workers still satisfy
  attribute-existence probes and resolve the real class on first
  access when numpy becomes importable.

Parity test polynomial_namespace_exposes_numpy_classes asserts
identity (`ours.is(theirs)`) for all 6 names and round-trips a
Polynomial((1,2,3)) construction through the re-exported class.

Part of franken_numpy-0247.
br-franken_numpy-d7a1
